'''Arye Gross''' is a [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] who performed the voice of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] in the [[1996]] [[Return of the Jedi (radio)|''Return of the Jedi'' radio adaptation]]<ref name="RadioDramas" /> and in [[1997]] ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Read-Along]]''.<ref name="ESB">''[[The Empire Strikes Back Read-Along]]''</ref>
